title: Plane crash lands in Klein Karoo
bodyText:
Breaking News
                            Video

GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS AND  VIDEO - A small plane crash-landed on a koppie this afternoon next to Karee Kamma Road in the Klein Karoo close to Van Wyksdorp.


> The pilot, believed to be a trainee, seems to be uninjured.


Police and emergency services are on the scene.


> A pilot who stays nearby, said he finds it strange that he did not do an emergency landing before he crash-landed on the koppie, as about 3km of flat territory preceded the crash site.


This is a developing story.

VIDEO: Daron Cohen

Your browser does not support HTML5 video.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
